nodes.title: Summit Auto Care
nodes.heroTitle: Honest Auto Repair You Can Trust

heroDescription.processed: Summit Auto Care provides reliable, transparent auto repair and maintenance services for all makes and models. Our ASE-certified technicians use the latest diagnostic equipment to get you back on the road safely.

nodes.ctaTitle: Need a Repair? Book Online Today

ctaDescription.processed: Schedule your appointment online and skip the wait. We offer free estimates, shuttle service, and a comfortable waiting area with Wi-Fi and complimentary coffee.
